title: Quotes or an estimate for a construction company
excerpt: Hola comunidad!! I’m looking to create an estimate from the mobile app, on the field for a construction company, something like freshbooks that from the mobile you can do and send a nice estimate. eQuotes doesn’t work on…

posts.author: ofuks001 (Omara Fuks)
posts.cookedHtml: Hola comunidad!! I’m looking to create an estimate from the mobile app, on the field for a construction company, something like freshbooks that from the mobile you can do and send a nice estimate. eQuotes doesn’t work on the mobile app and I came across the same issue with all external apps. Any suggestions? Pura Vida!

posts.author: Chrism99 (Chris Medina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ofuks001!

This is definitely possible, but you would need to use external API to work it out.

Direct message me if you’d like to discuss this further!

Chris Medina

VP of Support
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 224-723-9450 | Email : Chrism@carbonweb.co

posts.author: Azhyr (Benoit Provencal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ofuks001 !

Is this issue resolved ? I’m looking for the same here.

posts.author: Bianca (Bianca Clement)
posts.cookedHtml:
@ofuks001 you could definitely do this in app; you would have to build a quite extensive board first full of formula recipes and automations- this is something I’m very experienced with- feel free to reach out if you’d like some assistance.
biancajclement@gmail.com

posts.cookedHtml:
